arts.ttl: Rangers fan dies in Istanbul ahead of match
arts.sum: Reports in the Turkish press suggest that the man was crossing the road in the early hours when he was hit by a car.

arts.ttl: Rangers XI vs Fenerbahce – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Rangers travel to Turkey to face Fenerbahce in the first leg of their Europa League last-16 tie tonight. The Scottish side are enduring a tough period, following three shock defeats – all on home soil – in their last five fixtures.
